planner_snapshot.goal: Make GitHub sync and portable workspace state explicit for Hermes and context-mode

plan.step: Audit where Hermes and context-mode store state
Add repo-side sync script, version counter, and restore docs
Verify safe export mode and record policy

notes: Repo now tracks Hermes project-local state via .codex-workflow planner/task memory files.
Repo now includes a versioned sync script and project-safe context snapshot export.
Full raw context-mode backup is available only as an explicit flag because home-level DB files may include other projects.

task_memory_tail.summary: Attendance editing now supports manual tutor selection independent from enrollment tutor. Linked WhatsApp evaluations resync to the corrected attendance tutor and enrollment.

verification.browser_smoke: /attendance/ redirected to login without 500 after rebuild

task_memory_tail.summary: WhatsApp management now filters validated and unvalidated rows for both group and contact tables. Students list now supports active/inactive filter plus quick page search, student detail can toggle active state, and student/tutor detail tabs use only the person name as title.

verification.browser_smoke: login page passed after web rebuild

task_memory_tail.summary: Added WhatsApp validated/unvalidated UI filters, student active/inactive filtering and quick search, student active toggle action, and short tab titles for student/tutor detail pages.

details.verification: docker compose exec -T web python -m pytest tests/test_whatsapp_bot_dashboard.py tests/test_student_views.py tests/test_tutor_detail_view.py -q => 8 passed
details.notes: WhatsApp filters are client-side over DB-backed tables; student quick search filters current page rows only.

task_memory_tail.summary: Fixed enrollment edit form so student/tutor rate defaults no longer render with trailing .00 that broke IntegerField submission.

details.verification: docker compose exec -T web python -m pytest tests/test_enrollment_form_view.py -q => 2 passed, 2 warnings
details.root_cause: Edit route assigned Numeric(15,2) DB values directly into IntegerField defaults, producing values like 43750.00 in browser inputs.

task_memory_tail.summary: Added quick search to both WhatsApp bot tables: group list and contact directory.

details.verification: docker compose exec -T web python -m pytest tests/test_whatsapp_bot_dashboard.py -q => passed
details.notes: Search is client-side, works together with validated/unvalidated filters and existing pagination.

task_memory_tail.summary: Added quick search to daftar tutor and presensi sesi les tables.

details.verification: docker compose exec -T web python -m pytest tests/test_attendance_list_view.py tests/test_tutor_list_view.py -q => passed
details.notes: Search is client-side for currently rendered rows on the active page.

task_memory_tail.summary: Fixed tutor detail 500 caused by Jinja iterating day_bucket.items instead of the day bucket items key.

details.verification: docker compose exec -T web python -m pytest tests/test_tutor_detail_view.py -q => passed
details.root_cause: Teaching schedule data is a list of dicts; Jinja resolved day_bucket.items to the dict method instead of the items payload.

task_memory_tail.summary: Added taught-subject summary to tutor detail and a new subject detail page listing tutors who teach the subject.

details.verification: docker compose exec -T web python -m pytest tests/test_tutor_detail_view.py tests/test_subject_detail_view.py tests/test_public_id_routes.py -q => passed
details.notes: Summaries combine attendance sessions and enrollment data to avoid losing tutor-subject relationships when one source is sparse.

task_memory_tail.summary: Tutor/subject detail teaching summaries verified in rebuilt web container.

details.tests: docker compose exec -T web python -m pytest tests/test_tutor_detail_view.py tests/test_subject_detail_view.py tests/test_public_id_routes.py -q => 7 passed in 0.09s
details.deploy: hermes deploy_release_execute build web => success on retry; up web => recreated container successfully
details.note: Initial build attempt failed due transient network unreachable to auth.docker.io; retry succeeded.

task_memory_tail.summary: Added a repo-side Hermes/GitHub sync workflow with version counter and context snapshot export.

details.verification: python3 scripts/hermes_github_sync.py --skip-git => ok, version v0001 created
details.note: Hermes github_required enforcement exists in Hermes project settings, not in repo code. Raw context-mode DB backup is optional via --include-global-context due privacy/scope risk.
